summary_one_line_zh: 多模态模型、沙箱执行和小模型编排一起在落地侧加速
summary_one_line_en: Multimodal models, sandboxed execution, and small-model orchestration are all accelerating.

items.why_zh: 说明 agent 代码执行正从容器/VM 走向更轻隔离层，成本和冷启动会变得可控
items.why_en: Code execution is moving toward lighter isolation, changing cost and cold-start economics.
items.so_what_zh: 把你们的代码执行面板换成 WASM 沙箱原型，压测冷启动和权限边界
items.so_what_en: Prototype a WASM sandbox for code execution and benchmark startup plus permission boundaries.

items.title_zh: 小模型多模型编排打金融战
items.why_zh: 多模型协作不再只拼成本，开始拼角色分工、路由和一致性，适合做生产级编排参考
items.why_en: Multi-model systems are now about role design, routing, and consistency—not just lower cost.
items.so_what_zh: 把你们最贵的链路拆成角色分工图，找出能被小模型接管的两个节点
items.so_what_en: Map your expensive chain into roles and identify two nodes small models can take over.
